MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-16-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF SALIM JABBOUR'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/19/05 IS CONTINUED TO 11/7/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY IS LIMITED TO THE DEPOSITIONS WHICH WERE ALREADY NOTICED. APPLICATION TO THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT WILL BE REQUIRED FOR ANY ADDITIONAL DISCOVERY. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE ROBERT E. DONDERO; CLERKS: V.MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)
